# White Screen Online — llms.txt
# https://www.whitescreenonline.app
# Free browser-based utility tools for screens, timers, lighting, and focus.
# All tools run in-browser, no account or install required.

## About
White Screen Online provides 40+ free browser tools including solid color screens,
lighting aids for video calls, productivity timers, prank screens, screensavers,
and ambient tools. Tools work on any device with a modern browser.

## Tools

### Solid Colors
- White Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/white-screen
- Black Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/black-screen
- Red Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/red-screen
- Green Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/green-screen
- Blue Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/blue-screen
- Yellow Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/yellow-screen
- Orange Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/orange-screen
- Pink Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/pink-screen
- Purple Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/purple-screen
- Custom Color Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/custom-color-screen
- Dead Pixel Test: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/dead-pixel-test

### Lighting
- Zoom Lighting: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/zoom-lighting
- Ring Light Simulator: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/ring-light
- RGB Gradient Light: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/rgb-gradient

### Timers & Productivity
- Pomodoro Timer: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/pomodoro-timer
- Countdown Timer: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/countdown-timer
- Stopwatch: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/stopwatch
- HIIT Workout Timer: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/hiit-timer
- Focus/Study Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/focus-screen
- Meditation Breather: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/meditation-breather
- Tip Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/tip-screen

### Screensavers & Ambient
- DVD Screensaver: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/dvd-screensaver
- Matrix Screensaver: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/matrix-screensaver
- Starfield Screensaver: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/starfield-screensaver
- Particle System: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/particle-system
- Flip Clock: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/flip-clock
- Motivational Quotes: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/motivational-quote
- Rain Ambient: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/rain-ambient
- White Noise Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/white-noise
- SMPTE Color Bars: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/smpte-color-bars

### Prank Screens
- Broken Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/broken-screen
- Radar Screen: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/radar-screen
- Blue Screen of Death: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/bsod
- Hacker Typer: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/hacker-typer

### Fake Updates
- Windows 10 Update: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/windows-10-update
- Windows XP Update: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/windows-xp-update
- macOS Update: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/macos-update
- Ubuntu Update: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/ubuntu-update
- Chrome OS Update: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/tool/chromeos-update

## Blog

- How to Use Your Phone or Laptop Screen as a DIY Ring Light: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/blog/phone-screen-as-ring-light
- How to Test Your Monitor for Dead Pixels — Free, No Software Required: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/blog/how-to-test-monitor-dead-pixels
- The Best Free Browser Tools for Focus and Deep Work: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/blog/best-focus-tools-working-from-home
- Color Temperature Explained: Warm vs Cool Light for Video Calls and Photography: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/blog/color-temperature-guide
- How to Use the Pomodoro Technique for Studying: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/blog/pomodoro-technique-for-studying
- White Noise vs Pink Noise vs Brown Noise: Which Is Best for Sleep and Focus?: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/blog/white-noise-vs-pink-noise-vs-brown-noise
- OLED Burn-In Explained: What Causes It and How Screensavers Help: https://www.whitescreenonline.app/blog/oled-burn-in-screensavers
